replies.msg:
唔係話一定冇舞弊，只係澄清返：

-爆100%只係當地一個鎮，得幾百人，因為搬屋嘅原因，當地有解釋，亦係常見現象。
-填票叫 ballot duplication，因為有啲票過唔到機要人手寫，左邊讀右邊抄，twitter post link嘅都自己認係誤會咗
-13萬係數據中心出錯，實質上係1.3萬
-「唔比監票」地點係Philadelphia convention center，翻查返其實一直有人喺入面監票，亦搵唔到任何source話入面冇人監票，除咗條tweet之外，法庭手令只係由原本20呎距離縮到6呎。

《紐約郵報》的報導提到佛羅里達州橙縣（Orange County）第538縣區出現103%投票率，並引述橙縣選舉監察員辦事處的官方Twitter帳戶解釋，在10月6日登記限期前有754名選民在第538縣區登記，但限期後有選民因已搬進該區而更新地址，而且在今次大選中投票，令第538縣區的投票人數多於10月6日的選民登記數字【1、3】

而之前有傳成個州都超過100%，更加係無稽之談。

2）Ballot Duplication，官方文件【2】指出係由兩位點票人員處理，瘋傳嗰條片中的確係兩位，左邊讀望住右邊填。
另外一條角度好啲嘅片，相同情況，https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3N5MEEXkglk
至於監票係有距離要求，賓州新令現時係6呎。
喂，咁郵寄票同抄票點監？我都答你唔到。
參考：賓州法院駁回關於睇唔到mail-in票嘅覆核：
In one appeal to a Pennsylvania appellate court, the Trump campaign complained that one of its representatives was prevented from seeing the writing on mail-in ballots that were being opened and processed in Philadelphia. A judge in Philadelphia dismissed it, saying that poll observers are directed to observe, not audit.

所以，你可以話：邊個知？佢地鐘意點填就點填架啦。

3）有減。出錯嘅係Decision Dest，即係整選情地圖嘅機構。
相關回覆：
Decision Desk headquarters, which has partnered with Vox for election results, told Recode that the apparent result was a “simple error from a file created by the state that we ingested” — in other words, a numerical typo.【4】


4）一直都有人喺入面，只係投訴隔太遠。
Republican election watcher Daryl Brooks on the afternoon of Election Day, as he stood inside the Convention Center watching the Philadelphia vote count. “You have to have binoculars or bionic vision to see what the heck these people are doing,” Brooks, a West Philadelphia resident, told me. “We are all behind this gate, this barrier. We can’t go past it. But the problem is, the work is being done so far away from us, that we can’t see anything. And so we are damn pissed.【5】”


5）剛剛賓州最高法院頒左令俾共和黨人入去監票啦，只係剛剛，唔係之前啊.............我搵唔到呢單新聞，歡迎提供資料。

冇話亂唔亂解嘅，怕有誤會啫，希望盡可能factcheck。
如果個個看圖講故事，都無謂啦。

參考
【1】https://nypost.com/2020/11/03/one-florida-precinct-manages-a-mega-103-percent-voter-turnout/
【2】https://recorder.countyofventura.org/wp-content/uploads/2018/05/BALLOT-DUPLICATION-PROCESS-FACTS-2-Final-1.pdf
【3】https://www.thestandnews.com/international/%E9%8C%AF%E8%AA%A4%E5%8F%8A%E8%AA%A4%E5%B0%8E%E5%85%A7%E5%AE%B9-%E7%BE%8E%E5%9C%8B%E5%A4%A7%E9%81%B8%E6%9C%89%E5%9C%B0%E5%8D%80%E6%8A%95%E7%A5%A8%E7%8E%87%E8%B6%85%E9%81%8E100-%E5%A8%81%E6%96%AF%E5%BA%B7%E6%98%9F%E5%B7%9E%E6%8A%95%E7%A5%A8%E7%8E%87%E6%9A%B4%E5%A2%9E/
